query_normalized: latentskill: from in-context textual skills to in-weight latent skills for llm agents linguistics
rationale: The paper analyzes the same underlying mechanism of skill representation in LLM agents—how procedural expertise is either internalized in model weights or externalized via memory/skills modules—and discusses the trade‑off between parametric (in‑weight) and externalized capabilities, satisfying criterion (a) (same‑mechanism evidence).
